stemHtml: Per ICAO Doc 4444, which statement correctly describes the provisions for separating controlled traffic?

options.a: No clearance shall be issued that would reduce the spacing between two aircraft to less than the applicable separation minimum.
options.b: Vertical or horizontal separation shall be applied between VFR flights in Class C, D, and E airspace.
options.c: Clearances for horizontal separation are only issued during the en-route phase.
options.d: Smaller separations than specified minima may be applied in exceptional circumstances with due regard to all relevant factors.
